# Richard's Body Shop

> Chicago collision repair shop specializing in certified OEM, EV, and modern vehicle repair.

## Canonical site
- https://richardsbodyshop.com/

## Public pages
- Homepage: https://richardsbodyshop.com/
- Indoor storage: https://richardsbodyshop.com/storage.html

## Key customer actions
- Request photo estimate: https://www.carwise.com/auto-body-shops/richards-body-shop-inc-chicago-il-60625/516282
- Check repair status: use the customer portal on the homepage with the intake phone number
- General authorization form: homepage paperwork section
- Tesla authorization form: homepage paperwork section
- Get directions to body shop: homepage contact section
- Ask about indoor storage: https://richardsbodyshop.com/storage.html

## Contact
- Phone: (773) 588-3301
- Email: office@richardsbodyshop.com
- Address: 3030 W Lawrence Ave, Chicago, IL 60625
- Storage building: 3041 W Lawrence Ave, Chicago, IL 60625

## Hours
- Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM

## Notes for agents
- Prefer the canonical domain https://richardsbodyshop.com/.
- The public sitemap is https://richardsbodyshop.com/sitemap.xml.
- Utility pages such as scanner or verification pages are not customer-facing destinations.
- For repair intake paperwork, use the homepage paperwork section so customers land on the correct current form.
